statusLine.command: input=$(cat); current_dir=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir'); model_name=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name'); dir_name=$(basename "$current_dir"); if git -C "$current_dir" rev-parse --git-dir > /dev/null 2>&1; then branch=$(git -C "$current_dir" --no-optional-locks branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || echo "detached"); if ! git -C "$current_dir" --no-optional-locks diff-index --quiet HEAD -- 2>/dev/null; then dirty="✗"; else dirty=""; fi; git_info=$(printf "\033[1;34mgit:(\033[0;31m%s\033[1;34m) \033[0;33m%s" "$branch" "$dirty"); else git_info=""; fi; printf "\033[1;32m➜\033[0m  \033[0;36m%s\033[0m %s\033[0m | %s" "$dir_name" "$git_info" "$model_name"
